group_1.textCenter: Hey there, all my viewers on Dotube!
[chara:800900:effect_emotion_joy_0][se:7222_happy]It's your superstar born in Takarazaki,@DJ Disco here!
Today's an emergency stream
delivered straight in front of Kamihama's 1090~!
...Now, what am I cooking up, you may ask...@Let me explain...
Now before that, do you what's going down in@Kamihama City right now?
That's right, not a single person can eat@or drink all of a sudden.
But here's the real issue...@About a week ago?
An anonymous source contacted@your D-sco here with,
believe it or not, a direct message prediction@of this very phenomenon​
happening this very day!
This is totally an incident~@We gotta investigate~
However, investigating blindly won't get us@anywhere!
So to start with, I've asked a friend@of mine who lives in Kamihama,
the model Ria Ami, to make an@appearance remotely from her home!
A big welcome to the lovely Riaaaa~!
Heey! It's been a while, Mister D-sco~!
And all of Mister D-sco's fans, too―@Nice to meet you~!
(Friend...?)
(All we did was work the same event@one time at a department store!)

group_1.narration: "Thanks for agreeing to appear today, Ria."
"By the way, speaking of appearing remotely―@Is the room you're in now your room, Ria?"

group_1.textCenter: Astute of you, Mister D-sco!@Indeed, you're right!
So please don't be looking around too much!
(It's a free virtual background!)

group_1.narration: "Ahaha, sorry, sorry.@It's a young woman's room so@I started feeling the tension."

group_1.textCenter: Let's move on to the main topic!

group_1.narration: "I see, I see~@Despite being hungry and thirsty,@the body won't take anything in."

group_1.textCenter: Yes, it's been really tough...

group_1.narration: "Sure is...@Just listening to your story is tough.@It's making me hungry..."

group_1.textCenter: Ah, Mister D-sco, that was a bit rude just now.

group_1.narration: "Oops, tongue slipped.@Sorry about that.@Ask me anything as an apology."

group_1.textCenter: (Is this...my chance...?)
Then if I may take you up on that for a moment,@I would like to bring up an unrelated topic.

group_1.narration: "Eh, what's that?"

group_1.textCenter: I would like to introduce an online petition
to you and your many fans, Mister D-sco...
May I speak for a moment?

group_1.narration: "I see. Kamihama's got a real problem@with the East and West, don't they..."
"I'm a dude from Takarazaki myself,@so I've always heard about these old timey fights."
"Pretty deep-rooted too, isn't it."
"All my wonderful viewers, please sign it too."

group_1.textCenter: Please do so~!

group_1.narration: "But hey now, Ria,@did you really just do this?"

group_1.textCenter: Yeah?

group_1.narration: "'Cause like, you harass the East,"
"since you're from the West, don't you, Ria?"
"...I'm jokin' I'm jokin' lol.@We all know not everyone hates the East,@and we all know Ria's not that kind of person."

group_1.textCenter: Oh-ohh ho ho!
That's Mister D-sco for you, such a terrible joker!

group_1.narration: "You're right, sorry about that."
"But hey, you got me wondering why."

group_1.textCenter: Why?

group_1.narration: "Why, despite being from the West,@you're getting close to people from the East,@and even promoting a petition for them,"
"while there's people who hate the East@with all their hearts."
"There's such a discrepancy here.@What in the world is the difference,@I'm wondering."

group_1.textCenter: ...No, Mister D-sco, there's a bit of a mistake there.

group_1.narration: "Meaning?"

group_1.textCenter: There is fundamentally no difference
between myself and those@who speak poorly of the East.
I, too, am like them.
Even if we are different now...
